title: Tick Control in Travis, Staten Island | $125–$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Travis, Staten Island. Protect your family and pets from Lyme disease. Starting at $125. Licensed experts. Call today!
intro: Travis, Staten Island's westernmost neighborhood, with its proximity to the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge and abundant green spaces, provides ideal habitats for ticks that can threaten your family and pets. Best Pest Control NYC delivers comprehensive tick control services throughout Travis, from the residential areas near Victory Boulevard to properties backing onto marshlands and wooded areas. Our targeted treatments eliminate ticks at all life stages and create lasting protection for your outdoor spaces.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in tick control for Staten Island's unique environment, understanding the challenges posed by Travis's proximity to wildlife areas and wetlands. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are effective against deer ticks and other species while remaining safe for your children, pets, and the local ecosystem.
localContext: Travis homes near the Travis-Chelsea border and those with yards adjacent to the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge face heightened tick exposure due to deer and small mammal activity. Properties along residential streets like Morrow Street and Victory Boulevard with tall grasses, leaf litter, or wooded perimeters require specialized treatment to create tick-free zones for families to enjoy Staten Island's outdoor lifestyle safely.

faqs.question: Why is tick control especially important in Travis, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Travis borders the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge and contains numerous wooded areas and wetlands that support deer and rodent populations—primary tick carriers. This makes residential properties in Travis particularly vulnerable to tick infestations, especially during spring and fall when tick activity peaks. Professional tick control protects your family from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses.

faqs.question: What does the $125–$325 price range depend on for tick control in Travis?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on your property size, the extent of vegetation and wooded areas, severity of tick presence, and treatment frequency. Smaller yards with minimal vegetation start at $125, while larger properties near the wildlife refuge or those requiring intensive treatment and perimeter barriers reach $325. We provide free inspections and customized quotes for all Travis properties.

faqs.question: When is the best time to schedule tick control service in Travis?
faqs.answer: We recommend beginning tick control in early spring (April) before tick season peaks, with follow-up treatments in late spring and early fall. For Travis properties near wooded areas or the wildlife refuge, a seasonal prevention program provides the most effective protection. However, we offer year-round services and can address active infestations at any time.

faqs.question: Are your tick control treatments safe for pets and children in Travis?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-registered products that are highly effective against ticks but have minimal impact on people and pets when applied correctly. Our technicians are trained in safe application methods, and we provide clear instructions for re-entry times (typically 2-4 hours). Your family can safely enjoy your Travis yard once treatments have dried.
